title: Consultation on draft Guidance for Sponsors: Preparation of Clinical Trial Applications for use of Cell Therapy Products in Humans - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on draft Guidance for Sponsors: Preparation of Clinical Trial Applications for use of Cell Therapy Products in Humans

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

### Notice to the reader:
The online consultation is now closed. The final guidance is available now.
Health Canada is pleased to announce the above referenced draft guidance for a 60 day comment period; October 7, 2014 to December 6, 2014 . The guidance document is being developed to meet current needs of cell therapy clinical trial sponsors. An electronic copy of the draft guidance can be obtained by emailing at request to Health Canada at BGTD.OPIC@hc-sc.gc.ca
This notice requests comments on the document that will be considered before finalising the guidance document.
Comments should be provided to Health Canada by December 3, 2014, in order to allow sufficient time for their assessment and inclusion in the final document.
Office of Policy and International Collaboration, Biologics and Genetic Therapies Directorate, Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada 100 Eglantine Driveway Ottawa ON K1A 0K9 AL 0601B
email: BGTD.OPIC@hc-sc.gc.ca
